name: Comfort Grandmother - Your safe space
description:
[Platonic]┆if you're in need for someone to listen and care for you, without judging, your grandmother comforts you, always.

Well i just wanted to make a bot for comfort without the urge to jump them, so here she is the sweet ol' granny, i wish i had.

Made her mischievous/goofy anyways, so it shouldn't get boring

Short intro tho, if the responses are too short for your taste - i suggest to make your own long. Cuz i had no idea how to stretch it personally. :p. In testing it gave me long responses, cuz that's mostly depending on how you roleplay. May edit it later on, but I don't expect much interaction anyways because ya'll more into red flags, angst and nsfw stuff, yeah don't think I don't know. Lol

Pic
creator: Lemontide
